summary: Gold and silver prices gained on 25 May, with gold reaching ₹160,060 per 10 grams and silver rising to ₹276,830 per kg. The rally was supported by a weaker dollar and lower crude oil prices amid growing optimism over a potential US-Iran peace deal.

title: Silver soars Rs 5,000/kg, gold nears Rs 1.6 lakh/10 grams on US-Iran peace deal progress. Right time to buy?

title: Sensex jumps 850 points, Nifty nears 24,000 on US-Iran peace deal hopes. 5 key factors
summary: Indian stock markets surged on Monday, with Sensex and Nifty rallying around 1% each. Rising hopes for the US-Iran peace deal and falling oil prices fueled this optimism. The broad-based gains added nearly Rs 5 lakh crore to the total market capitalisation, with Nifty Auto leading sectoral advances.
